item.title: The Spiciest Contest Ever: La Costena Jalapeno
item.description: A fun spicy contest featuring La Costena jalapeno, with plenty of flavor and heat in a lighthearted challenge.

item.title: 30 White Castle Burgers in 5 Minutes
item.description: A fun burger challenge featuring 30 White Castle burgers in five minutes. Challenge accepted!

media:content.media:description: A fun burger challenge featuring 30 White Castle burgers in five minutes. Challenge accepted!

item.title: New Record at Hillbilly Hot Dogs
item.description: A fun food challenge at Hillbilly Hot Dogs, featuring a record-setting visit and plenty of classic hot dog energy.

media:content.media:description: A fun food challenge at Hillbilly Hot Dogs, featuring a record-setting visit and plenty of classic hot dog energy.

item.title: West Virginia Hot Dog Challenge
item.description: The 2nd Best West Virginia Hot Dog didn't last long in this fun food challenge. A simple, flavorful bite with plenty of local flavor.

media:content.media:title: West Virginia Hot Dog Challenge
media:content.media:description: The 2nd Best West Virginia Hot Dog didn't last long in this fun food challenge. A simple, flavorful bite with plenty of local flavor.

item.title: The $500 Electric Chair Challenge!

item.title: Pizza Challenge: One Bet, One Clock
item.description: One bet, one clock, and a whole lot of pizza pressure in this timed food challenge.

item.title: 5Lb Burger Challenge in 30 Minutes
item.description: A massive burger challenge with a huge patty and a 30-minute time limit. Fun, flavorful, and built for a big appetite.

media:content.media:description: A massive burger challenge with a huge patty and a 30-minute time limit. Fun, flavorful, and built for a big appetite.
